name: Hearts And Minds Investments Limited
analysis: HM1's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.8800, stop A$2.7324, target A$3.3228 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
